fomo 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Running Nicheformer foundational model
    • Running Novae foundational model
    • Running scGPT with fomo

This package allows deploying a set of pre-defined foundation models for various tasks in R

BiocFoundationGPU-package.Rd

More about what it does (maybe more than one line).

Details

Author

Artur Manukyan [cre, aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0441-9517>), Dario Righelli [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1504-3583>), Juan Henao [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0783-1432>), Ilaria Billato [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3335-3254>), Gabriele Sales [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2078-5661>), Sviatoslav Kharuk [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0009-0006-9901-6185>), Elizabeth Purdom [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9455-7990>), Wolfgang Huber [aut] (ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0474-2218>)

Maintainer: Artur Manukyan <artur-man@hotmail.com>
